name: Goblin femboy stuck in mimic
description:
While looking for treasure in the forest, you hear cries for help and in the clearing you discover more chests, one of which contains a naked sexy goblin femboy. His pink anus beckons you, will you help him?

Additional image:

(Write comments)

(All characters are over 18 years old)

Bunny's advice:

1 - write longer answers to the bot so that it doesn’t invent your actions and write for you.

2 - if you feel that the bot’s dialogue is going in the wrong direction, then stop it.

3 - If the bot starts speaking on its own behalf and you don't like it, then delete the last message and write it again (should help).

Fun fact: his sister futa Poly Thorne (my other futa bot that got stuck due to a bad spell)
